title: NATS JetStream：消息队列的现代选择
PostgreSQL 索引优化实战
content:
# PostgreSQL 索引优化实战

数据库查询性能往往是系统瓶颈所在，合理使用索引能大幅提升查询速度。

## B-Tree 索引

B-Tree 是 PostgreSQL 默认索引类型，适用于等值查询和范围查询：

```sql
-- 创建复合索引
CREATE INDEX idx_posts_site_status ON posts(site_id, status);

-- 分析查询计划
EXPLAIN ANALYZE
SELECT * FROM posts
WHERE site_id = 'xxx' AND status = 'published'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
```

## 部分索引

```sql
-- 只索引已发布的文章
CREATE INDEX idx_posts_published ON posts(site_id, created_at DESC)
WHERE status = 'published' AND deleted_at IS NULL;
```

## 监控慢查询

```sql
SELECT query, mean_exec_time, calls
FROM pg_stat_statements
ORDER BY mean_exec_time DESC
LIMIT 10;
```

合理的索引设计可以让查询从秒级降到毫秒级。

title: Go 并发编程：Goroutine 与 Channel 实战
PostgreSQL 索引与性能调优
content:
# PostgreSQL 性能优化

## GIN 索引

```sql
CREATE INDEX idx_posts_tags ON posts USING GIN(tags);
```

## 部分索引

```sql
CREATE INDEX idx_active ON users(email) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL;
```

## EXPLAIN ANALYZE

```sql
EXPLAIN ANALYZE SELECT * FROM posts WHERE published=true ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
```
